title: `Anab #6024
definition:
Anab = "fruit"

 1) a city in the mountains of southern Judah, 18 miles southwest of
    Hebron
nasbUsage:

 1) a city in the mountains of southern Judah, 18 miles southwest of
    Hebron

    NASB:  grape, a place in the hill country of Judah
